reviews.title: Not peach colored
reviews.text:
First off, I thought these were a peach color...WRONG. Very bright! Since I will be using them for working out, it's not that big of deal.
Secondly, they feel on the smaller side. I always wear an 8 1/2 in Nike, but then seem a little snug. I loosened the laces and wore them around the house and I guess I will get use to them.
Definately not my favorite pair of shoes, but I hate the hassle of returning in stuff, so will keep them and see how it goes.

reviews.title: Love these shoes!
reviews.text: Mt favorite. My second pair of nikes I bought and have not been disappointed yet. These shoes are true to size, comfy, and nice light weight breathable material. I recommend to buy two pair. I'm going to look into more colors.

reviews.title: The shoe looks exactly as expected, I ordered a ...
reviews.text: The shoe looks exactly as expected, I ordered a half size larger than I normally wear and it is tight. I might suggest ordering a full size up for a proper fit.

reviews.title: Sizing is WAY OFF!
reviews.text: Love the shoe but OMG the sizing is WAY OFF! I have ordered this shoe four times consecutively and each time they run SUPER SMALL. My 10 year old daughter wears a 6.5 and I have had to order a 9 after ordering a 7, 7.5 and an 8.5 and none of those fit her. I will update my review once the 9’s come in. We order shoes every 4-6 months and she loves Nikes but these are made in Vietnam versus her last pair made in India and the sizing couldn’t be more off! See photos!

reviews.title: Great running shoes
reviews.text: Excellent running shoes. The fit is more on the tight side, but it definitely fits. I give it 4/5 stars because it's not quite as comfortable as the Adidas Duramo line which also has adiprene. However I have yet to run a lot in these so it may be better than Duramo in the long term, or for more intense running. Duramo's have extra padding that, while very comfortable, feels like it could eventually start to chafe. These have a more snug fit with no such padding, but are still very comfortable.

title: Salomon Women's Speedcross 3 Trail Running Shoe
description: Salomon was born in 1947 in the heart of the French Alps and the birthplace of modern alpinism. Driven by a passion for skiing and design innovation, Francois Salomon and his son George designed and perfected much of the first modern ski equipment. During the following 60 years, Salomon's commitment to innovative design and passion for mountain sports created a vast range of revolutionary new concepts in boots, skis and apparel and brought innovative solutions to footwear, apparel and equipment for hiking, adventure racing, mountaineering and trail running. Through performance-driven design, Salomon enhances mountain sports by converting new ideas into action and expanding the limits of possibility.

I get many compliments on the appearance, which is streamlined and not at all "clunky."

title: Mizuno Women's Wave Horizon 2 Running Shoe
description:
Introducing the softest, most stable ride ever to come out of Mizuno running. Our new stability technology called smooth ride support is combined with cloud Wave to create a soft, lively and cushioned feel with adequate support and smooth guidance.
Since our founding in 1906, we at Mizuno have taken special pride and pleasure in being able to participate in the exciting world of sports and in making the entire globe the stage for our activities. Each and every one of us is guided by the ideal of true sportsmanship. That was true nearly 100 years ago and is still true today. It is evident in our corporate philosophy which, simply stated, is "Contributing to society through the advancement of sporting goods and the promotion of sports." This philosophy is clearly reflected in our strong support of numerous worldwide sport events and in our dedication to advancing sports through cutting edge technology and research. Our product development strategy is to create products with features that enhance athlete performance and are unique to only Mizuno. These technological advancements make our sporting equipment and apparel go the extra mile and keep you in tip top playing form no matter the sport nor the conditions. Whether it's our Breath Thermo line of clothing which generates heat from the absorption of moisture to keep you warm in cooler temperatures, to our line of Arctic Touch garments that expels heat and moisture generated by the body during exercise to keep your body cool and comfortable, your comfort and performance are at the forefront of our innovation. From the diamond to the track, from the court to the fairway, Mizuno's commitment to Serious Performance shines through. Today, the high quality equipment that only Mizuno can produce are relied upon by athletes throughout the world. We produce superior quality equipment for serious performance, through the artful combination of technology and craftsmanship. Because, at Mizuno, your passion is our obsession.

reviews.title: Not sure if my feet grew... :)
reviews.text: I'm 55 and normally wear a 11.5 regular so that's what I ordered. My toes were super scrunched up and hitting the tip of the shoe, so I had to return them and order a half size up. They seem narrow in the front to me. Aside from that IMO they look better in the pics than in person but for the price I'm not going to complain too much. Seems like a solid shoe otherwise. The inserts seem to be glued in which is a bummer because I use orthotic inserts especially in my running shoes.

reviews.title: Who'd,thunk....these could be so comfortable
reviews.text: I have been wearing Asics for several years now and have been pleased. They do not last very long but they are comfortable and at about $50 per pair (always buy on sale) it is much cheaper then other name brands. I thought I would try the mid tops as I used to wear hightops in my early years. I am glad I did, they are very comfortable. So good that I just ordered a second pair (grey) as soon as I tried these coffee (brown) ones on. The grey ones are on sale for just $40 so its a no-brainer.

reviews.title: High top Asics
reviews.text: I've worn Asics for ever and was actually skeptical about buying since other reviewers that where Asics gave poor reviews. Well, in glad I bought them. I have always wanted Asics to make a high top and they finally did. These will make great trail shoes. I'm returning a pair of Merrells that didn't fit like old Merrells did. The Asics have built in stability for people with high arches. They are lightweight,  comfortable and fit like good shoes should. Asics didn't drop the bar as others complained, looks like the same high quality at reasonable prices they are known for.

reviews.title: Comfortable, sturdy and a great value.
reviews.text:
First things First. I received this as a review item in exchange for an unbiased review. I have an 11 M foot (US) and while I wasn't overly crazy about the color, I realized they matched a lot of my race wear. So I decided to give them a try. The first run was a little tough but that's always the case (If you're new to running, trust me, don't run your first race without adequately breaking in your shoes). After about 15 miles I started to really like them.

So, you see the colors. I personally always buy the clip on laces which I did butI've probably got well over 60 miles on them now and while I'm pretty loyal to another brand (which is also costs substantially more) I will definitely be picking up another pair.

If you are a heel striker (work on your form before you suffer the consequences of it) these have ample cusioning in the back - but take a friendly word of advice, instead of getting into bad form. These are great shoes to improve your form with and once you have it, the extra padding in the back is not impediment. They are very light and fit well once worn in. I'm not trilled about the simultaneously yet cool look they have but so is life. You don't buy running shoes to look cool unless you're a poster you buy them for performance and these deliver.

Again I'm speaking to new runners and people that aren't that familiar with the sport. You don't want to have one pair you wear every day. They'll develop a wear pattern and it's not good. Instead buy at least two, ideally a few and alternate so that this happens at a much slower pace. From my experience, three pairs of shoes worn on alternating days will last much longer than one pair bought three times. And this is important b/c unless you're working on bearfoot running (which seems to still be a raging philosophical battle in the podiatric communities) you'll want support, comfort and stability. As a digression, I've tried barefoot running and it fundamentally changed the way I ran, until I stepped on a piece of glass and my right foot had yet to harden.

Again at the risk of lecturing remember that injuries are one of the biggest enemies to progress. You could easily run through broken glass on these and probably right over some smaller nails (I'm not advising it, just pointing it out). Styling aside I love these and will be picking up another pair or two in the near future.

title: AUGSUN 110pcs 1/4inch Stainless Steel Track and Cross Country Spikes with Spike Wrench, Replacement Spikes for Sprint Sports Short Running Shoes…

【QUALITY MATERIAL】: Made of quality stainless steel, which is very sturdy, rust-resist and anti-corrode. Pyramid needle design, not damage track. Very practical items for both men and women.

【EASY TO USE & REPLACE SPIKES】: The package includes a spike wrench. It is very easy for you to screw the track spikes into the shoes, convenient to replace the spikes. Ideal for athletic tracks, field and cross country surfaces.

【PROVIDE GREAT DRIP FOR SPORTSMAN】: The spike pins can increase the friction between the shoe sole and ground, resist skid and improve your running balance of traction, flexibility and speed for track sprints, long jump, running.

I would suggest going with something else.

title: Brooks Womens Glycerin 18 Running Shoe
description: A bit like running in the clouds. Thanks to the increased elasticity of the upper and the super-soft cushioning throughout the length, these men's running shoes are the ultimate comfort. Super soft cushioning. The revised ratio between midsole and outer sole allows you to increase LOFT DNA to achieve even more extreme softness at the sole of the foot, without losing reactivity or endurance. An OrthoLiteTM insole ensures an extraordinary wearing comfort.
features: Imported
Rubber sole
THIS WOMEN'S SHOE IS FOR: The Glycerin 18 is perfect for runners who think there's no such thing as too much cushioning. The upper enhances comfort by perfectly balancing stretch and structure.

SUPPORT AND CUSHION: Provides neutral support while offering the maximum amount of cushioning. Ideal for road running, cross training, the gym or wherever you might want to take them! Predecessor: Glycerin 17.

SUPER-SOFT CUSHIONING: Increased DNA LOFT super-soft cushioning allows for even more extreme softness, without losing responsiveness or durability, while the OrthoLite sockliner provides premium step-in comfort.
PLUSH FIT: The plush feel of an internal stretch bootie surrounds your foot and moves and expands with your stride. The engineered mesh upper enhances the fit.
SMOOTH TRANSITIONS: The plush transition zone makes every move from heel to toe feel incredibly soft and smooth.

If you need a cushioned shoe with good support these are the ones to buy.

reviews.text:
Absolutly love it ... hold volleyball shoes on the outside of the bag ... if there was an update to the design it would be to make a clip open wide enough so shoes could go heel to heel to keep dirt or elements together.

If you looking for a clip to hold shoes on the outside of the bag -- Look No Further - THIS IS IT!

reviews.title: Does it’s job
reviews.text: This product does the job. No frills but does what it’s designed to do. The clip gets a little hard to open but o actually like it because running throw the airport with muddy sneakers o never worry about them coming loose

reviews.title: Not worth 20 or even 15
reviews.text: Good idea, but the metal clip fell of within 20 uses. This item just isn't made with quality in mind, wish it was!

reviews.title: Great while it lasted!
reviews.text: Worked great for about 5 months.

reviews.title: Cheap junk
reviews.text: The plastic broke after using it 5 or 6 times. Avoid.

title: WHITIN Men's Max Cushioned Running Shoes | Superior Comfort, Yet Remaining Stability
features: Ethylene Vinyl Acetate sole
Open engineered knit upper offers enhanced breathability and comfort.
Rubberized foam outsole provides long-lasting durability and adequate grip.
Internal heel counter provides lightweight response and lasting durability and support.
Lace-up closure and padded tongue provides locked-in fit and support for neutral runners.
Durable density foam midsole with a lower heel to toe drop provide lightweight and propulsive power.

reviews.title: Buy a Size Larger
reviews.text: This show has a short toe box but with plenty of heel and arch space.  I'm glad that I purchased a 10 instead of a 9.5 .  It is a perfect fit, really supports my knees. Terrific product 😊

reviews.title: Not a running shoe
reviews.text:
Surprising. This is not a road shoe by any stretch of the imagination. I've been switching from heel toe stride to mid foot striker. Not comfortable enough and minimal cushioning
This at best is for walking.
Also tight in the toe box. Kind of surprising. I will not be buying more of these
Also oddly they came in plastic wrap. No box. Cosmetic but just odd

reviews.title: Good stable comfortable shoe
reviews.text: I finally found a show that offers stability comfort and no memory foam! Considering stocking up!

reviews.title: You'll get what you pay for.
reviews.text: Updated: Over the long term, wearing them daily for work...Garbage.

reviews.title: Horrible shoe. Barbie shoes are better quality.
reviews.text: I don't like to write negative reviews but this shoe truly sucks. So cheaply made. Colour was nice though .

title: ASICS Women's Gel-Kenun Lyte MX Running Shoes
description: Cloud-like comfort meets street-forward style in the ultra-lightweight GEL-Kenun Lyte MX. Fusing the fluid lines of the GEL-Kenun series with seat-belt buckle design inspiration, this cushioned silhouette delivers a secure, supportive fit that works with your natural gait to guide efficient strides all day long. Borrowing from the iconic GEL-LYTE III, a split tongue and plush collar make for an easy-on, easy-off trait that doubles as a style-focused detail. Weight: 6.4. Heel Height: 22. Forefoot Height: 12.
features: Synthetic-and-mesh
Rubber sole

reviews.title: Okay for casual, not a whole lot of support though
reviews.text: Cute shoe but not ideal for being on your feet for hours. I work 12 hour shifts and my heels were killing me the first 12 hour shift I worked in them. If comfort and stability is what you’re going for, I’d go with a different ASICS shoe. I wouldn’t ever run in them and I’m looking for inserts/a new work shoe but I’ll still wear them casually

title: Nike Women's Running Shoe
description: Nike Women's Enigma Nike Shox Black/Black/Gym Red BQ9001-001
features: Rubber sole

reviews.title: Knock offs!! Just DON'T DO IT ✅
reviews.text: [[VIDEOID:e270e5dd29b72c4c1bdeae3b2a3671e1]] They are dirty with red clay mud. Very very poorly made. For $185 I expect more quality. The material is not properly laid. I am a Nike Shox NZ fanatic. I have over 10 pair and clearly  these are knock offs. The Nike swish is smaller then my pinky finger nail. The shocks are not even so the shoe tilts. I will stick to buying in the store that way I know exactly what I am getting. Ohh let me add they charge you to return items. You have to drive to UPS to drop them off and they charge you a fee. I can not make this up the attached pictures do not lie. Do not buy from this seller. Don't do it!!!! Very disappointed 😞 RETURNING!!!!!

reviews.title: recommended for painful Plantar Fasciitis
reviews.text: recommended for painful Plantar Fasciitis . I ordered these for that reason, and pretty much wear them all the time.

reviews.title: Nike shox
reviews.text: Love them

title: ALTRA Men's AL0A4VQM Olympus 4 Trail Running Shoe
features: Imported
Vibram sole
Go Further: Improved breathability and premium tongues for better comfort will have you locked in
Get Comfortable: Signature Altra balanced cushioning and FootShape toe boxes allow your toes to spread and encourages proper, low-impact form throughout your run
Stay Focused: Vibram Megagrip rubber outsoles provide secure traction on varied terrain
Push Yourself: InnerFlex midsole technology ensures increased flexibility and performance
Stay Comfortable: Stack height of 33mm provides ample cushion for long runs

reviews.title: Very comfortable shoe.
reviews.text:
The bottom of the shoe is thick.
But the overall weight of the shoe is not bad.
I feel like I have better contact than any other shoe I own.
I like the quality, money well spent.

reviews.title: Runs much smaller/shorter than the Lone Peak 6, and much stiffer than expected
reviews.text: I own a pair of Lone Peak 6 size 11 which have a little toe allowance.  Same size 11 Olympus 4 literally had my toes scrunched along the front of the shoe!  May have to go one whole size up for proper fitting.  They also felt a LOT stiffer than the Lone Peaks, which surprised me given they are supposed to have maximum cushioning;  the Lone Peaks actually feel more cushy to me.  Returning the 11s and mulling over whether I should bother trying a 11.5 or a 12, considering how much stiffer they felt.

reviews.title: HD user, Size 14 feet, torn knees 50+
reviews.text:
I tear up any shoes in 3-4 months and these ones hold up the best (4+months ave.)…I’ve destroyed many pairs and won’t use anything else. They are comfortable and allow me to continue working out with aches or injury (from hiking every day).
Size 14 ft
Wgt 250
Ex-Athlete with numerous knee and back injuries
Hike 6 miles per day and workout in the gym to maintain good fitness level.
Neuropathy in feet.
Compression fractures in back (old injury)

These shoes are made for Clydesdale ex-athletes like myself…I‘be been using Altra for 4 years…

reviews.title: A good shoe
reviews.text: As this is my third pair of Altra Olympus shoes, I can say I am a happy customer. Each pair has lasted just over 1000 miles trekking over rough terrain. The Vibram is great but only holds out so long. Thank you Altra. Great customer service too. 😜

reviews.title: I'm waiting for the hiking day.
reviews.text: searched for these shoes after recommending them on Youtuber, but I bought them after thinking about it because I didn't like the color, but it's light and I'm waiting for the hiking day.

title: New Balance Men's FuelCell Rebel Tr V1 Running Shoe
description: Packed with the features you need for performance, the New Balance FuelCell Rebel TR men's running shoe provides the ultimate underfoot experience for athletes of any level. With FuelCell midsole foam and an ABZORB Dynamic Response System for impressive rebound, this shoe has the power to carry you through running, training, and everything in between. It's grounded in performance, but built for stand-out style.
features: 100% Textile
Made in the USA or Imported
Rubber sole
FitWeave Lite
Synthetic upper with no-sew overlays
ABZORB Dynamic Response System provides added rebound
Exposed TPU shank adds support without compromising flexibility
FuelCell foam delivers a propulsive feel to help drive you forward

reviews.title: Stylish & comfortable!
reviews.text: Great fit, nice bright colors & great design! These are a win!!!

reviews.title: Way too small
reviews.text: Returned due to fact i couldnt get my foot in it !!! Ridiculous to me its the same size of all my NB shoes !

title: Brooks Men’s Launch 9 Neutral Running Shoe
features: Imported

THIS MEN’S SHOE IS FOR: The Launch 9 is for neutral runners who want a dependable, lightweight shoe with DNA cushioning and a highly breathable upper that helps runners go fast on every run. We recommend ordering Brooks running shoes 1/2 to one size larger than your dress shoe.
NEUTRAL SUPPORT: Lightweight, streamlined, with even more BioMoGo DNA cushioning, the Launch 9 offers neutral support to keep you running faster mile after mile.
ENHANCED BREATHABILITY: Reengineered upper features Creel Warp mesh, designed to be extremely light and breathable. Hints of reflectivity on the upper to increase visibility on the road.

LIGHTWEIGHT CUSHIONING: We have added more BioMoGo DNA cushioning to the midsole for an even faster ride without the extra weight. A dynamically responsive ride for days when you are working on your speed.
RESPONSIVE TRANSITIONS: Redesigned midsole increased by 2 mm to provide runners with more responsiveness while the Green Rubber Outsole helps your foot move quickly from heel to toe.

reviews.title: My new favorite running shoe.
reviews.text: Perfect fit right out of the box.  Wonderful cushioned run and very light weight.  Well made and no signs of wear even after several long runs.  Wide enough toe box to prevent any rubbing.  True to size.

reviews.title: BROOKS ARE The BEST SHOES HANDS DOWN
reviews.text: Nothing to dislike light durable great for weightlifting

reviews.title: Get what you pay for
reviews.text:
I sent these back after trying on. They look longer than they are when on your feet, I assume it’s due to the design. Didn’t have the best feel and overall a great name but bad shoe.
I’d go with a better brooks or On Clouds

reviews.title: Very light and comfortable
reviews.text: Nice and light and comfortable which was what I wanted. I love how well they fit. Good price, too, for the quality.

title: New Balance Women's W1260V5 Running Shoe
description: We stand for something bigger than sneakers. We champion those who are fearlessly driven by their passions. We elevate sport. We do right by people and the planet. Together, we drive meaningful change in communities around the world. We Got Now.
features: 50% Breathable Air Mesh, 50% Synthetic
Imported
Rubber sole
ABZORB heel crash pad absorbs impact through a combination of cushioning and compression resistance
Asymmetrical heel counter
Breathable air mesh
Dual-density construction utilizes softer EVA on top for comfort and cushioning, with more dense EVA on bottom for support

reviews.title: Runs a tad large, order 1/2 size down.. still 5+ stars!!!!
reviews.text: I have bought New Balance 1260’s for years and I am always a size 10.  This shoe was too big as a 10 and I had to return for a 9.5.  That being said, I still give it 5 stars and would give more if I could!  These were by far the most comfortable, light weight, and best looking (better than the pic by far) New Balance I’ve ever owned. I ordered in another color the next day!  Love these shoes.

reviews.title: Great shoes though
reviews.text: Even though I ordered wide width they are a little more snug across the ball of my foot than my other new Balance shoes of the same size.  Great shoes though.  Very comfortable and lightweight.  Love the color too!

reviews.title: These v5's are even more comfortable and have a sleeker narrower fit
reviews.text: Wow! I have 2 pair of the 1260v4 that are my absolute favs.  These v5's are even more comfortable and have a sleeker narrower fit. I love the color and the attention to details.

reviews.title: Very comfortable shoes!
reviews.text: I loved these shoes the first moment I put them on my feet.  They are so comfortable and provide so much support.  You really get your money's worth in these shoes.  They are like walking on clouds.  I walked in a 5K recently and they were amazing and my feet felt great afterwards. Highly recommend!

reviews.title: Great style!
reviews.text: Great Shoe! I have received compliments on the style!
